name: agent-loop
description: Codex-native Agent Loop workflow: run long tasks through subagents, filesystem state, handoffs, verification, and hook continuation.

interface.shortDescription: Filesystem-backed subagent workflow for long Codex tasks
interface.longDescription: Agent Loop turns a long objective into a visible plan, delegates task execution to subagents, stores state and handoffs in the workspace, and uses hooks to continue active work without an external loop.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Loop to plan and run this long task
